description:
Design a floating solar array (floatovoltaics) on the provided reservoir foundation in Los Angeles. The base project is open in Energy3D. Follow these steps:
1. Set the project location to Los Angeles, CA via the Location/City menu.
2. Ensure there is a Solar Panel Rack on the central foundation (if not, add one or more) with a total of at least 100 solar panels.
3. Configure the rack(s) Tilt Angle to 10 degrees and Base Height to 0.5m (typical for water-based installs).
4. Modify the 'Temperature Coefficient of Pmax' property of the panels to -0.2 %/°C to model the evaporative cooling benefit of the reservoir.
5. Run an Annual Yield Analysis for the array.
6. Export the resulting yield graph data to exactly `~/Documents/Energy3D/fpv_yield.csv`.
7. Save the modified Energy3D project to `~/Documents/Energy3D/fpv_design.ng3`.
